title: Rohan's Animal Sounds
synopsis: Little Rohan discovers different animals and the happy sounds they make, creating a joyful symphony of farmyard friends that delights his senses.

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler boy with warm brown skin and curly black hair points excitedly at a friendly brown and white cow. The cow has large, gentle eyes and is standing in a sunny green pasture with soft rolling hills. Rohan wears a bright yellow shirt and has a big smile showing his delight.
illustration.alt: Rohan pointing at a cow in a green field

pages.text: Happy cow says moo! Rohan giggles.

illustration.description: The same brown and white cow with a sweet expression, mouth open as if mooing, surrounded by soft pink and yellow flowers. Rohan claps his hands with joy, his eyes sparkling with laughter. The background shows a peaceful farm scene with a red barn in the distance.
illustration.alt: Rohan giggling while the cow moos

illustration.description: Rohan looks curiously at a fluffy white sheep with a pink nose and kind black eyes. The sheep stands on soft green grass dotted with tiny white daisies. Rohan's expression shows wonder and excitement as he discovers this new animal friend.
illustration.alt: Rohan looking at a white sheep

pages.text: Fluffy sheep says baa! Rohan claps.

illustration.description: The white sheep with its mouth open in a gentle 'baa' expression, while Rohan claps his small hands together with pure delight. Soft lavender and mint green colors fill the background with wispy clouds in a pale blue sky.
illustration.alt: Rohan clapping as the sheep says baa

illustration.description: A round, pink pig with a curly tail and friendly snout looks up at Rohan. The pig has rosy cheeks and small bright eyes. Rohan points down at the pig with curiosity, standing in a muddy pen with wooden fence posts visible.
illustration.alt: Rohan pointing at a pink pig

pages.text: Pink pig says oink! Rohan smiles.

illustration.description: The cheerful pink pig with its snout raised as if oinking happily, while Rohan beams with a wide, joyful smile. The scene is filled with warm peachy and coral tones, with soft hay scattered around the pen area.
illustration.alt: Rohan smiling at the oinking pig

illustration.description: A bright yellow duck with an orange beak waddles near a small blue pond. Rohan crouches down to the duck's level, his face full of gentle excitement. Water lilies float on the pond's surface, and cattails sway in the background.
illustration.alt: Rohan crouching near a yellow duck by a pond

pages.text: Yellow duck says quack! Rohan laughs.

illustration.description: The adorable yellow duck with its beak open in a quack, creating small ripples in the blue water. Rohan sits on the grassy bank, head tilted back in delighted laughter, his arms stretched wide with happiness. Soft aqua and sage green tones surround them.
illustration.alt: Rohan laughing as the duck quacks

pages.text: All animals sing! Rohan loves the sounds!

illustration.description: All the animals together - the cow, sheep, pig, and duck - arranged in a semi-circle around happy Rohan who sits in the center with arms outstretched. Each animal has its mouth open as if making their sound. The scene glows with golden sunset light and rainbow-colored musical notes float in the air.
illustration.alt: Rohan surrounded by all the animals making sounds together

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the cow make?
How does Rohan feel about the animal sounds?
questions.explanation: Rohan loves the sounds and feels happy!
